## Treatment Details

**Process**:

citations.cited_text: ... Microneedles Penetration: The treatment begins with the gentle penetration of tiny, ultra-fine needles into the skin’s surface. Radiofrequency Ene...
citations.title: RF Microneedling | Ageless MedSpa Katy, Texas - Ageless Med Spa located in Katy, Texas

content.text: The treatment begins with the gentle penetration of tiny, ultra-fine needles into the skin's surface. Simultaneously, controlled radiofrequency energy is emitted through the microneedles, targeting specific layers of the skin.
**Comfort**:

citations.cited_text: ... RF microneedling can cause some discomfort, but Dr. Kim applies a topical numbing cream beforehand to relieve pain during treatment. The RF energy...
citations.title: RF Microneedling Treatment | Glow Up MD Spa Katy TX

content.text: RF microneedling can cause some discomfort, but Dr. Kim applies a topical numbing cream beforehand to relieve pain during treatment. The RF energy the device uses feels like a mild warming sensation, and you may feel quick pricks as the needles penetrate your skin.
**Results Timeline**:

citations.cited_text: While you may see initial improvements in your skin’s tone and texture within weeks of your first treatment, most people need multiple sessions to ach...
citations.title: RF Microneedling Treatment | Glow Up MD Spa Katy TX

content.text: While you may see initial improvements in your skin's tone and texture within weeks of your first treatment, most people need multiple sessions to achieve lasting results. Every person is different, but three to four microneedling treatments spaced four to six weeks apart are standard for long-term skin rejuvenation.
**Downtime**:
